factors.summary: Organic revenue growth is improving across most segments, driven by increased sales volumes and operational efficiency.

evidence.text: Organic sales growth in the quarter and six months was driven by sales growth in Security and Fire, Environmental and Energy Solutions, and Smart Energy.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Organic revenue growth is improving across most segments, driven by increased sales volumes and operational efficiency.

factors.summary: The company is holding prices, with some segments experiencing positive pricing trends.

evidence.text: Gross margin percentage increased in the quarter primarily due to higher gross margin in Aerospace and Performance Materials and Technologies (approximately 1.7 percentage point impact collectively), partially offset by higher repositioning and other charges allocated to cost of products and services sold (approximately 0.9 percentage point impact) and lower gross margin in Home and Building Technologies and Safety and Productivity Solutions (approximately 0.5 percentage point impact collectively).

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: The company is holding prices, with some segments experiencing positive pricing trends.

factors.summary: Gross and operating margins are expanding due to productivity improvements and cost management.

evidence.text: Gross margin percentage increased in the quarter primarily due to higher gross margin in Aerospace and Performance Materials and Technologies (approximately 1.7 percentage point impact collectively), partially offset by higher repositioning and other charges allocated to cost of products and services sold (approximately 0.9 percentage point impact) and lower gross margin in Home and Building Technologies and Safety and Productivity Solutions (approximately 0.5 percentage point impact collectively).

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Gross and operating margins are expanding due to productivity improvements and cost management.

factors.summary: Restructuring and productivity initiatives are delivering measurable savings, contributing to improved margins.

evidence.text: The increase in operational segment profit is primarily due to restructuring benefits, higher organic sales volume, partially offset by inflation.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Restructuring and productivity initiatives are delivering measurable savings, contributing to improved margins.

factors.summary: Productivity improvements are significant, driven by cost reduction initiatives and operational efficiency.

evidence.text: The increase in operational segment profit is primarily due to productivity, net of inflation, offset by the unfavorable impact of product mix.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Productivity improvements are significant, driven by cost reduction initiatives and operational efficiency.

factors.summary: Management expects continued growth and has maintained a positive outlook for the future.

evidence.text: The Company currently expects the effective tax rate for 2017 to be approximately 24%. The effective tax rate can vary from quarter to quarter for unusual or infrequently occurring items, the resolution of income tax audits, changes in tax laws or other items such as pension mark-to-market adjustments and the tax impact from employee share-based payments.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Management expects continued growth and has maintained a positive outlook for the future.

factors.summary: Foreign currency translation and U.S. tax matters are key sensitivities impacting near-term results.

evidence.text: The effective tax rate decreased in the quarter primarily driven by increased tax benefits for employee share-based payments and the resolution of various U.S. tax matters, partially offset by increased expense for reserves.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Foreign currency translation and U.S. tax matters are key sensitivities impacting near-term results.

factors.summary: The company has been active in acquisitions, with recent activity contributing to growth.

evidence.text: Safety and Productivity Solutions sales increased in the quarter and six months ended June 30, 2017 primarily due to growth from acquisitions and increased organic sales volume partially offset by the unfavorable impact of foreign currency exchange.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: The company has been active in acquisitions, with recent activity contributing to growth.

factors.summary: Free cash flow generation is improving, driven by favorable working capital and increased net income.

evidence.text: Cash provided by operating activities increased by $485 million primarily due to (i) a $309 million favorable impact from working capital, (ii) an increase in net income of $179 million and (iii) a $73 million improvement in customer advances and deferred income, partially offset by increased cash tax payments of $252 million.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Free cash flow is improving due to favorable working capital and increased net income.
